forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: e580
+project: skills-guide-review
+title: Remove duplicate generic coding advice from `detected-projects` body
+---
+## What
+
+`builtin/skills/detected-projects/SKILL.md` ends with a generic `## Approach` section that repeats rules already lived in `thoughtful/SKILL.md` ("Think before acting", "Prefer editing over rewriting", etc.). Per the guide, SKILL.md should stay focused on the skill's core instructions; generic approach rules belong once, globally.
+
+This also bloats the context loaded when the skill triggers.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] Remove the `## Approach` section from `detected-projects/SKILL.md`.
+- [ ] Leave the actual process (`detect projects` call + guidance) intact.
+
+## Tests
+
+- [ ] Skill still loads and Claude still calls `detect projects` correctly when triggered.
+
+## Reference
+
+Anthropic guide, Chapter 5 — "Instructions not followed / Instructions too verbose" — keep instructions concise.
\ No newline at end of file

changes.value:
## What

`builtin/skills/detected-projects/SKILL.md` ends with a generic `## Approach` section that repeats rules already lived in `thoughtful/SKILL.md` ("Think before acting", "Prefer editing over rewriting", etc.). Per the guide, SKILL.md should stay focused on the skill's core instructions; generic approach rules belong once, globally.

This also bloats the context loaded when the skill triggers.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Remove the `## Approach` section from `detected-projects/SKILL.md`.
- [ ] Leave the actual process (`detect projects` call + guidance) intact.

## Tests

- [ ] Skill still loads and Claude still calls `detect projects` correctly when triggered.

## Reference

Anthropic guide, Chapter 5 — "Instructions not followed / Instructions too verbose" — keep instructions concise.
Remove duplicate generic coding advice from `detected-projects` body
